assertions.description: The ti92revive PCB is an early layout with only 10 footprints placed (IC1 TCA8418 + R2 + 8 key positions) and 0 tracks routed. The analyzer correctly reports routing_complete=false, copper_layers_used=0, and 14 unrouted nets. The partial key matrix layout matches the source PCB file.

INCORRECT: In the PCB analyzer output, footprint kbLBrack1 has its value field set to a raw parsed list (the fp_text value node contents) instead of the string '('. The source PCB has '(fp_text value "(" ...)' which is being misread when the value token is the open-parenthesis character. Expected value: '(' (string), actual value: [["at", "0.508", "-4.064"], ["layer", "F.SilkS"], "hide", ...].

INCORRECT: The footprint '18650:TCA8418-WQFN-24-1EP_4x4mm' placed on B.Cu has all SMD pads (pad type 'smd rect' on layers F.Cu/F.Paste/F.Mask) but carries an '(attr through_hole)' annotation in the KiCad 5 PCB format. The analyzer reports type='through_hole' following the attr field rather than the actual pad type. The PCB statistics therefore count it as tht_count=9 instead of smd_count=10 in the ti92revive PCB. The WQFN-24 package is a surface-mount device.
